title: Files aur folders list karna
use_case: Current directory ke files, hidden files aur permissions dekhne ke liye.
output_explanation: Permissions, owner, group, size, date aur filename show hota hai.

title: Disk space check karna
use_case: Server ke mounted disks ka used/free space dekhne ke liye.
output_explanation: -h size ko human readable format me show karta hai.
